commits: feat(lexer+parser): M2.3 strategy holes - Question token, Hole/HoleRef AST
axc-hir: M2.3 strategy holes — StrategyHoles, lowering, validation (AT-1008..AT-1012, AT-1051)
axc-optimize: M2.3 strategy enumerator + grid search (AT-1014..AT-1026)
axc-driver: M2.3 — axc optimize subcommand, --strategy-value, compile_source_with_assignments (AT-1027..AT-1030)
axc-driver: M2.3 strategy text substitution + SAXPY autotune integration test (AT-1031)
M2.3: Complete AT-1032..AT-1050 acceptance tests (57 total AT-1000-range tests)

axc_parser.parser.rs: Added MAX_HOLE_CANDIDATES=256, parse_strategy_block(), parse_hole_candidate_list(), 6 new ParseError variants, AT-1001..AT-1007 + AT-1032..AT-1035 + AT-1052

axc_hir.hir.rs: Added StrategyHoles (BTreeMap<String,Vec<i64>>) + strategy field on KernelAnnotations
axc_hir.validate.rs: Added 5 HirError variants + 3 HirWarning variants for strategy hole validation
axc_hir.lower.rs: Added lower_strategy_annotation(), validate_hole_refs(), HoleRef placeholder dim handling; AT-1008..AT-1012 + AT-1051

axc_optimize.Cargo.toml: Added axc-hir, axc-codegen, xxhash-rust, thiserror, serde{,_json} deps
axc_optimize.enumerator.rs: enumerate_strategy (Cartesian product, xxh3 variant_id), resolve_single_variant, cartesian_product_size; AT-1014..AT-1021 + AT-1036..AT-1039
axc_optimize.grid_search.rs: grid_search with correctness policy + R3 fallback, StrategyVariant, SampleStats, BenchOutcome, GridSearchResult, CorrectnessPolicy; AT-1022..AT-1026 + AT-1040..AT-1042

axc_driver.cli.rs: Added StrategyValue type, Compile::strategy_values, Optimize subcommand with N3-compliant help text
axc_driver.lib.rs: Added optimize module, compile_source_with_assignments, substitute_strategy_holes + strip_strategy_annotation_block; AT-1043..AT-1045

design_nits_addressed.N1: TokenKind::Question added to lexer — no pre-existing Question variant confirmed
design_nits_addressed.N2: Grid search pseudocode documented in grid_search.rs module doc; R3 fallback chain ordinal 0→1→2→3 implemented
design_nits_addressed.N3: CLI help text in cli.rs clarifies --strategy-value assigns one value (NOT enumerates candidates)

pre_existing_issues.compile_q4_0_dequant_matvec.rs: Pre-existing dead_code + manual is_multiple_of clippy errors (not introduced by M2.3)
pre_existing_issues.common_helpers.rs: Pre-existing doc list indentation + repeated push clippy errors (not introduced by M2.3)
